```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest) 
```
```{r}
# Load data
test_data <- read.csv("~/Documents/annotation-data/backchannels-average-engagment.csv", sep=";")
test_data <- test_data %>%
  group_by(subject)
```
```{r}
# Convert columns to factors as needed
test_data$condition <- as.factor(test_data$condition)
test_data$subject <- as.factor(test_data$subject)

```
```{r}
test_data$condition <- relevel(test_data$condition, ref = "medium") #Change condition to serve as reference to get each pairwise comparison
```
```{r}
# Fit the mixed-effects model with the subject_id as a random effect
test_model <- lmer(avg_engagement ~ condition + (1 | subject), data = test_data)
summary(test_model)
```
